text: Events for communicating between scripts by running callbacks.
validate; Will make sure script instance exists, and that the callback is declared on the receiving end, before queuing the event. This is the default type.
blind; Will blindly queue the event without making any validation checks. Can be useful for sending events to script we know will come alive the next tick.
instant; Same as blind event, but sent immediately.
Sends an event to a specified [Character].
params: The function name in a character script.
Optional arguments to be sent to the callback.
The type of event. Defaults to [sm.event.types, sm.event.types.validate].
Optional, defaults to true. If true, pauses saving for 1 tick for delayed event types (server only).
return: result					Returns true if the event was successfully processed.

text: Sends an event to the game script.
params: The function name in the game script.
Optional arguments to be sent to the callback.
The type of event. Defaults to [sm.event.types, sm.event.types.validate].
Optional, defaults to true. If true, pauses saving for 1 tick for delayed event types (server only).
return: result			Returns true if the event was successfully processed.
